summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that triggers AI agents from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other webhook sources, with full UI management in settings.
summary.outcome: Built and shipped a complete webhook feature (PR #575): new `moltis-webhooks` crate with 7 source profiles, 9 auth modes, SQLite store, background worker, HTTP ingress endpoint, RPC API, web UI settings page, docs, test script, and 51 passing tests. Multiple bugs fixed during code review iterations.

repo: Settings sidebar nav icons are rendered via CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `[data-section='...']` attribute selectors — NOT from the `icon` property in the JS sections array

There are two style.css files: `src/assets/style.css` (Tailwind output, served) and `src/assets/css/style.css` (different file, not served by HTML). The HTML loads the Tailwind one via versioned path.
SQLite `ON DELETE CASCADE` does not work without `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON` on the connection; must be set explicitly in migrations or use explicit child deletes as a fallback
Arc::get_mut() silently returns None if any clone exists before the call — fields initialized this way may silently stay None. Use OnceLock or initialize before Arc wrapping instead.
Icon mask SVGs use stroke-only paths (fill='none') and are rendered via mask-image + background-color: currentColor in the CSS icon system
The cron/sandbox pages use `p-4`, `text-lg` title, and `gap-4` — webhooks page had to match this layout pattern
Hoppscotch web app cannot reach localhost due to CORS + mixed content restrictions; only the desktop app works for local Moltis instances
GonData in templates.rs must be extended with new feature data for the JS layer to access it at page load
Website i18n is handled via `website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs` string replacement — English changes to `index.en.html` must be followed by running the build script to propagate to all language files

code.finding: String slicing with byte indices (e.g. `&s[..500]`) panics on multibyte UTF-8; need a safe truncation helper that walks back to a char boundary
Two separate RwLocks for global and per-webhook limits create a TOCTOU race; must use a single Mutex to make check-and-record atomic
Stripe timestamp validation must fail closed — non-numeric `t=` values must reject, not silently skip validation
Crash recovery query must include 'processing' status in addition to 'received' and 'queued' to handle mid-execution deliveries interrupted by a restart

Auth secrets (auth_config, source_config) in Webhook structs must be redacted to '[REDACTED]' at the gateway service layer before returning to clients — they must never leak via list/get/update API responses
Generic profile should NOT fall back to body SHA-256 hash as dedup key — identical payloads without an explicit delivery ID header should always be processed
Webhook ingress endpoint needs Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * plus OPTIONS preflight handler to be reachable from browser-based tools like Hoppscotch
GitLab auth mode uses config key 'token', not 'secret' — the modal's auth config builder must special-case 'gitlab_token' before falling through to the generic 'secret' branch

workflow: Arc::get_mut is fragile for late field initialization — prefer OnceLock for fields that need to be set after Arc creation but before serving requests
When a review bot comments on 'unused imports', verify against the current HEAD not the commit the bot reviewed — the imports may have been added in a subsequent commit

Write regression tests for every reviewer-caught bug immediately at fix time, not as a follow-up — tests for multibyte panics, auth key mismatches, TOCTOU, and secret leakage all should have existed from the start
CSS mask-image icons with stroke-only SVGs render correctly but appear as black squares if the wrong icon class is used or the CSS is stale/cached
Background worker session updates are not pushed to open WebSocket sessions — named session mode works but UI requires a reload to see new messages appended by the worker

friction: Arc::get_mut silently failed causing webhook_store to stay None — ingress returned 404 on every request with no error log, extremely hard to debug without knowing the Arc clone pattern
Two style.css files with different content caused confusion about which one was actually served
Settings sidebar icon system is undocumented — the JS `icon` property is unused and icons come from CSS data-section selectors in components.css, wasting significant debugging time
Hoppscotch web app does not work with localhost due to CORS/mixed-content — the initial recommendation was wrong and had to be corrected twice
SQLite cascade deletes silently doing nothing without the foreign_keys pragma is a footgun not caught until code review
Stripe timestamp validation failing open (skipping rather than rejecting invalid values) was caught by reviewer, not by original implementation or tests
open_items: Live-refresh chat UI when background workers append messages to open named sessions (affects both webhooks and cron) — filed as beads issue moltis-2pu
Website i18n translations for webhook feature text are in English across all 9 language files — translations need to be added to the build script per-language
CIDR allowlist enforcement is implemented with IP extraction from X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-Ip headers but has no tests for the full allow/deny flow
Linear, Jira, and PagerDuty provider profiles were specified in the plan but only GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and Generic were implemented
Response action tools (post comments, merge PRs, issue refunds) were designed in the plan but not implemented — agents can receive webhooks but cannot act back via typed tools
Per-entity session locking (serialized processing per PR/issue) was planned but not implemented — concurrent deliveries for the same entity can race
